response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a seasoned polyglot engineer with strong TypeScript/Node.js and DLang experience, but the role demands deep Java and Kotlin expertise with hands-on Spring/JVM enterprise framework knowledge, neither of which is evident in his background. His single notable Java exposure was peripheral tooling work at Altom and NI (C/C++ IDE components), and his skills section lists Java without any supporting enterprise or JVM-depth evidence. He shows no Kotlin, no Spring/Quarkus/Hibernate experience, and no JVM internals or IDE plugin development relevant to this position.
strengths: Broad developer-tooling awareness: contributed components to NI LabWindows/CVI (a C IDE) and currently builds MCP code generators and agentic developer tooling at re:cinq
Demonstrated software craftsmanship culture: consistent TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and community knowledge-sharing across multiple roles
Staff-level seniority with experience on high-throughput, complex systems (millions of HTTP requests/sec at Dunnhumby; large-scale direct-mail automation at Optilyz)
concerns: Java and Kotlin are absent as primary languages throughout the career; TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang dominate virtually every role
Zero evidence of Spring, Quarkus, Hibernate, or any JVM enterprise framework usage — the core technical requirement of this position
No JVM tooling, IntelliJ plugin, language server, or IDE-internals experience relevant to building a Java/Kotlin enterprise IDE
